findings.description: B200 draws 188-190W at 0MB VRAM from cold boot — ghost power from power on
GPU0 consistently 2.39W higher than GPU1 — hardware asymmetry confirmed
NVML correctly reports 0MB and 0pct at idle — desync only occurs under load

conclusion: B200 ghost power 188-190W confirmed at 0MB VRAM. Hardware asymmetry 2.39W GPU0 higher.
